corrections.location: Primary navigation path to Approval Flows feature
corrections.impact: HIGH - This is the primary navigation path for the feature
corrections.notes: Approval flows is located under the Automations menu in the left sidebar, not under Settings. The Settings menu does not contain an 'Approval flows' item.

corrections.impact: MEDIUM - Secondary navigation path for role assignment prerequisite
corrections.notes: Role management is nested under an 'Organization' section within Settings menu. The UI shows 'Role management' (lowercase 'm'), not 'Role Management'.

validation_payload_corrections_required.description: The validation-payload.json file contains outdated navigation paths in the WTD (What To Do) tasks that were copied from old Zendesk articles. All instances need to be corrected.

changes_needed.old_value: Navigate to Settings > Approval flows > Leaves tab
changes_needed.new_value: Navigate to Automations > Approval flows > Leaves tab

changes_needed.old_value: Navigate to Settings > Approval flows > Payroll Transaction Request tab
changes_needed.new_value: Navigate to Automations > Approval flows > Payroll Transaction Request tab

changes_needed.old_value: Navigate to Settings > Approval flows > Work Expenses or Expenses section
changes_needed.new_value: Navigate to Automations > Approval flows > Work Expenses or Expenses section
Navigate to Settings > Organization > Role management
changes_needed.reason: Role management path now includes Organization section, and 'management' is lowercase in UI

screenshots_captured: 02-automations-expanded-showing-approval-flows.png - Automations menu expanded showing Approval flows submenu
03-settings-expanded-showing-role-management.png - Settings menu expanded showing Organization > Role management
04-approval-flows-page.png - Approval flows feature page showing Leave approval flow configuration
summary: Navigation validation completed. Found 2 incorrect navigation paths in the user guide. The primary issue is that 'Approval flows' is located under 'Automations' menu, not 'Settings'. The secondary issue is that 'Role management' is nested under 'Organization' within Settings. All corrections have been verified with screenshots from the live Bayzat interface.
